title: Quantity survey (QS Construction)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Quantity Surveyor to join our team. This role bridges project costing, quotation preparation, and client coordination, ideal for someone who enjoys a mix of analytical and administrative responsibilities within the construction and utilities sector.

You will work closely with internal teams, engineers, and clients to ensure accurate pricing, timely quotations, and smooth project execution from start to finish.

Key Responsibilities

Commercial & Costing

  • Prepare and issue project quotations based on client requirements and technical specifications
  • Perform cost estimation for tender submissions, including labour, material, and equipment breakdowns
  • Maintain accurate quotation records, pricing databases, and templates

Tender Management

  • Monitor and submit tenders via the GeBIZ portal
  • Identify and pursue new business opportunities listed on GeBIZ
  • Assist management in tracking potential leads and project opportunities

Project Oversight

  • Maintain oversight of all active projects to ensure nothing is stalled or delayed
  • Flag and escalate issues early to prevent bottlenecks in project delivery
  • Coordinate between clients and engineers to resolve scope clarifications, technical queries, and project concerns

Client & Stakeholder Liaison

  • Liaise with clients to clarify project scopes, follow up on quotations, and provide timely support
  • Work closely with internal teams (technical, operations, and admin) to gather necessary pricing information
  • Serve as a key communication link between external clients and internal engineering teams

Administrative Support

  • Provide general administrative support as needed

Requirements

Essential

  • Ability to read and interpret construction drawings, site layouts, and utility maps
  • Proficiency in reading maps (OneMap, Google Maps) for site and route planning
  • Strong costing and estimation skills
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel (costing models) and Word (documentation)
  • Highly organised with the ability to meet tight deadlines with minimal supervision
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

Preferred

  • Prior experience in construction, utilities, engineering, or other project-based environments
  • Familiarity with GeBIZ, tender processes, or quotation packaging

Why Join Us?

  • Hands-on experience in commercial project costing and tender management
  • Exposure to a fast-growing company with a strong reputation in the utilities and construction sector
  • Direct access to company leadership and decision-making processes
  • Supportive team culture with opportunities for professional growth
  • Develop valuable skills in pricing strategy, client engagement, and business development

postedCompany.description: We are a leading company in the construction industry that specializes in Underground Cable and utilities detection.  We are looking for highly motivated individuals to join us. If you are an LCDW, TCDW, Draftmen, Designer, account manager, project manager. Do feel free to contact us and see what oppurtunities might be avalible for you.
